label: Computer vision, perception & scene understanding

node.label: Computer vision, perception & scene understanding
node.definition: Vision-perception systems detect, classify, segment, track, reconstruct, and reason about objects, scenes, geometry, and events in images or video.
node.why_it_matters: They convert visual sensor data into state estimates usable by people, robots, vehicles, medicine, and scientific workflows.
limitations: Performance can fail under viewpoint, lighting, occlusion, domain shift, adversarial patterns, or ambiguous ground truth.

dependencies.rationale: Computer vision, perception & scene understanding integrates Convolutional neural networks as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Computer vision, perception & scene understanding integrates Vision Transformers & Perceiver-style latent models as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Computer vision, perception & scene understanding integrates Graph neural networks as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Computer vision, perception & scene understanding integrates Multimodal foundation models as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Computer vision, perception & scene understanding integrates Calibration, uncertainty & risk evaluation as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Computer vision, perception & scene understanding integrates Sets, point clouds & meshes as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Computer vision, perception & scene understanding integrates ResNets & DenseNets as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Computer vision, perception & scene understanding integrates Joint-embedding predictive architectures as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
Computer vision, perception & scene understanding integrates Semi-supervised & weak supervision as part of an end-to-end application boundary.

sentence_units.text: Vision-perception systems detect, classify, segment, track, reconstruct, and reason about objects, scenes, geometry, and events in images or video.
They convert visual sensor data into state estimates usable by people, robots, vehicles, medicine, and scientific workflows.
Performance can fail under viewpoint, lighting, occlusion, domain shift, adversarial patterns, or ambiguous ground truth.
Computer vision, perception & scene understanding integrates Convolutional neural networks as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
